step_rationale: Pro-resolving lipid mediator; suppresses leukocyte infiltration and promotes inflammation resolution in atherosclerotic plaques.
mechanism: Resolvin E1 dampens monocyte/macrophage recruitment and cytokine production, promoting plaque stabilization.

references.title: ERV1/ChemR23 Signaling Protects Against Atherosclerosis by Modifying Oxidized Low-Density Lipoprotein Uptake and Phagocytosis in Macrophages.
